notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for united_arab_emirates. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: United Arab Emirates Tourist and Visit Visa

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for United Arab Emirates
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to United Arab Emirates, VIZA AI should consider the visa-free eligibility or the UAE tourist/visit visa route. First confirm nationality, passport type, stay length, arrival emirate, purpose, accommodation, return or onward ticket, and whether the trip is tourism, family visit, transit or short business. Do not route UAE queries to Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Egypt or Schengen. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: UAE tourist visa channels and duration direction
chunks.content: The UAE Government portal says tourist/visit visas are used for tourism and other short visit purposes. Tourist visas are commonly arranged through UAE-based airlines, travel agencies, hotels, or official UAE visa-issuing authorities such as ICP/GDRFA channels. UAE official guidance also describes long-term multiple-entry tourist visa options and visit visa durations that can vary by category. VIZA AI should avoid guaranteeing entry or a fixed stay without checking passport nationality and current UAE official rules.

chunks.title: UAE entry checks and documents
chunks.content: For UAE visitor questions, ask for passport nationality, passport validity, arrival airport/emirate, return/onward ticket, hotel/accommodation, and purpose of visit. If the user is eligible for visa-free/visa-on-arrival entry, still explain that immigration officers make the final entry decision and airlines may check documents before boarding. For non-eligible travellers, direct them to official UAE ICP/GDRFA, airline, hotel or licensed travel agency channels.

documents.title: United Arab Emirates Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: United Arab Emirates application channel and form scope
chunks.content: UAE ICP/GDRFA, airline, hotel or agency tourist/visit visa route Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://u.ae/en/information-and-services/visa-and-emirates-id/tourist-visa. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: United Arab Emirates fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, travel dates, arrival emirate/airport, accommodation, purpose, contact details and sponsor/host where required

chunks.title: United Arab Emirates supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, photo, ticket/itinerary, hotel/accommodation or host, funds/insurance where required and airline/agency-specific uploads Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for united_arab_emirates.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://u.ae/en/information-and-services/visa-and-emirates-id/tourist-visa

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- a valid health insurance policy applicable in the UAE, valid for 180 days

Travel plan and port fields:
- A tourist visa is for those who are not eligible for visa on arrival or a visa-free entry to the UAE.
- The multiple entry 5-year tourist visa enables tourists to enter the UAE multiple times on self-sponsorship and remain in the country for 90 days on each visit, and can be extended for further 90 days.
- Family/group multiple entry long-term tourist visa - ICP

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- Licensed travel agents and hotels in the UAE can arrange a tourist visa for you provided you purchase the ticket through them and maintain hotel reservation with the specific hotel.
- In order to get a tourist visa to the UAE, you need to get in touch with one of the UAE-based airlines, a tour agency or a hotel (where you intend to stay) in the UAE who will apply for visa on your behalf to the official visa-issuing authorities in the UAE.

Funds, insurance, photo, and supporting-document fields:
- a valid health insurance policy applicable in the UAE, valid for 180 days

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
